profile_backing.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass177-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|eig_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot

top_rows.name: linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64
top_rows.note: Still broad-profile top, but exact-order GEMM layout families are in a rejection streak and recursive/Strassen-style GEMM remains contract-blocked by bit-exact ascending-k semantics.

top_rows.name: linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64
top_rows.route: top shippable non-GEMM structural row after GEMM contract gate

focused_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-gxkuk-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

candidate.lever: fill compact L21 during blocked Cholesky panel solve
candidate.description: Threaded the compact Schur-update L21 buffer through cholesky_panel_solve so each solved panel entry was copied once at production time instead of by a separate post-solve materialization loop.

proof_test.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-gxkuk-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 15 focused Cholesky tests passed in candidate state, including cholesky_blocked_path_golden_output_digest, cholesky_blocked_matches_scalar_and_reconstructs, cholesky_real_fast_path_bit_identical_to_complex_path, and candidate-only cholesky_panel_solve_fills_l21_compact_bits.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-gxkuk-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved diagonal block factorization order, independent panel row scheduling, each row's c=0..jb solve loop, the inner t=0..c subtraction order, lower Schur p/q traversal, c contribution order, and final row-major lower-triangular public output.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: Cholesky has no pivot or comparison tie-breaking surface.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate only changed when solved panel entries were copied into the compact L21 buffer. It introduced no reassociation, FMA forcing, mixed precision, reduction-tree change, or public NaN/signed-zero policy change.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: Cholesky consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public dtype, shape, or error surface changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

alien_source.applied_slice: Tested eliminating a separate panel-to-compact-L21 materialization pass after the prior kept row-parallel panel solve made the copy visible but still small.

next_primitive.target: finish or reject frankenjax-9dgqw safe-SIMD lower Schur dot, then reprofile
next_primitive.reason: Panel-copy elimination was too small and slightly regressed after the earlier panel parallelization keep. Do not repeat this copy-elimination family.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score gate with same-worker RCH A/B
proof_obligations: floating-point operation order unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead admits tolerance
